name: CHINA
narrative: At c=0.7: 8.6+35×0.7=€33. China faces EU CBAM at €78 on exports. Inside Themis at €33, China pays less than half the CBAM rate while retaining revenue domestically. CBAM pressure is the anchor. MC range: 25-50.
source_note: OECD Net ECR €8.63. ICAP: ETS expanding, ~100% free alloc. α_cov: CBAM €78 anchor.

name: UNITED STATES
narrative: At c=0.7: 3+28×0.7=€22.6. US social cost of carbon ~$50 (€46). At 70% coverage, competitive concerns ease. But no federal price and hostile admin. Regime-dependent. OECD: only 7.4% of emissions covered. MC range: 15-45.
source_note: OECD: explicit covers 7.4%. ICAP: CA $28, RGGI $20, WA $61. α_cov: regime-dependent.

name: EUROPEAN UNION
narrative: At c=0.7: 18.5+85×0.7=€78 = EU ETS. EU is the calibration anchor. The €60 reciprocity premium = value of others joining.
source_note: EU Commission: 57% auctioned, 40% coverage. α_cov calibrated to ETS €78 at c=0.7.

name: INDIA
narrative: At c=0.7: 4+16×0.7=€15. India's CCTS expected at €2-6. At 70% global coverage, India might accept €15 if transfers flow. Development-first but not anti-climate. MC range: 8-25.
source_note: OECD Net ECR €8.09 (fuel excise). Political-adjusted to €4. α_cov: development-first.

name: RUSSIA
narrative: At c=0.7: 0+7×0.7=€5. Russia has near-zero climate ambition. Even at full coverage, willingness stays very low. Fossil-geopolitical spoiler. MC range: 3-12.
source_note: Reuters: oil/gas ~20-25% budget. No carbon pricing. α_cov: fossil spoiler, very low.

name: INDONESIA
narrative: At c=0.7: 0+14×0.7=€10. Indonesia has JETP deal ($20B), emerging ETS. At 70% coverage with coal-transition finance, €10 is plausible. MC range: 8-20.
source_note: OECD Net ECR −€4.98, floored to 0. Power-sector ETS only. α_cov: JETP, emerging.

name: ADV. CARBON-PRICED CONDITIONAL JOINERS
narrative: At c=0.7: 5.8+35×0.7=€30. Group dominated by Japan (low price) and UK/Canada (higher). At 70% coverage, competitiveness fears ease. €30 is weighted between UK (~€40) and Japan (~€15). MC range: 20-45.
source_note: Pop-weighted headline; indicative only, not used in α_base directly.

name: LOW-CARBON FRONTIER
narrative: At c=0.7: 0+7×0.7=€5. Low-carbon frontier joins primarily for transfers, not carbon-price willingness. €5 reflects minimal autonomous willingness. MC range: 3-12.
source_note: No active carbon pricing in any member. α_base = €0.

name: HYDROCARBON RENTIERS
narrative: At c=0.7: 0+4×0.7=€3. Hydrocarbon rentiers have existential opposition to carbon pricing. Even at full coverage, willingness is near-zero. MC range: 2-8.
source_note: No carbon pricing. Fossil-rent dependent. α_base = €0.
